--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"employee":{"id":1},"teammates":[{"id":4,"details":{"forename":"Björn"},"products":["FINANCE","HUMAN_RESOURCES","MARKETING"]},{"id":11,"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"},"products":["FINANCE"]}]},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":["employee"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Jens","location":{"language":"German"}}},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"pending":[{"id":"2","path":["employee"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"hobbies":[{"__typename":"Exercise"},{"__typename":"Gaming"},{"__typename":"Other"},{"__typename":"Programming"},{"__typename":"Travelling"}]},"id":"2"}],"completed":[{"id":"2"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql--
